name: across the real spec corpus the majority of specs receive a scoped dependency hash rather than the whole-tree fallback
command: node "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/dep-hash.js" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/specs" rout.txt 2>/dev/null; total=$(wc -l < rout.txt); scoped=$(grep -vc '\tGLOBAL' rout.txt); [ "$scoped" -gt $((total/2)) ] && echo majority-specs-scoped 1>&2
